name: EdgeRiskAsmntSubmsnEnrStartEndDateExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT ENR_STRT_DT, ENR_END_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDGERiskAsmntOwner}.RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_CTL WHERE @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} >= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_BEG_DT AND @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} <= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_END_DT), cte_2 AS (SELECT SUBSTRING(dbo.trim_default(cte_1.ENR_STRT_DT),1,10) AS ENR_STRT_DT, SUBSTRING(dbo.trim_default(cte_1.ENR_END_DT),1,10) AS ENR_END_DT FROM cte_1) SELECT ENR_STRT_DT, ENR_END_DT FROM cte_2

JOB NAME:  EdgeRiskAsmntSubmsnEnrStartEndDateExtr

DESCRIPTION:  Seq files contains Enrollment Start and End dates from the RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_CTL table

CALLED BY:  EdgeServerEdwCmsEnrSeq

Annotations:
Enrollment Start and End dates from the RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_CTL table is loaded to the file only when 
'#CurrDate#' >= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_BEG_DT AND
'#CurrDate#' <= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_END_DT
